554	@cute.jit
555	def split_block_range(block_count, split_idx: Int32, num_splits: Int32):
556	    """Return the half-open block-list range assigned to one SplitKV partition."""
557	    blocks_per_split = cute.ceil_div(block_count, num_splits)
558	    block_begin = cutlass.min(split_idx * blocks_per_split, block_count)
559	    block_end = cutlass.min(block_begin + blocks_per_split, block_count)
560	    return block_begin, block_end
561	
562	
563	@cute.jit
564	def load_block_list_sm100(
565	    block_indices: cute.Tensor,
566	    block_begin,
567	    block_end,
568	    load_q_with_first: cutlass.Constexpr,
569	    q_stage: cutlass.Constexpr,
570	    kv_producer_state,
571	    load_Q,
572	    load_K,
573	    load_V,
574	    pipeline_kv,
575	):
576	    """SM100 version of load_block_list (no intra_wg_overlap, no extra_tx_count)."""
577	    block_count = block_end - block_begin
578	    if block_count > 0:
579	        # First iteration: load Q alongside K if requested
580	        n_block_first = block_indices[block_end - 1]
581	
582	        if const_expr(load_q_with_first):
583	            # SM100 loads Q0 and optionally Q1
584	            load_Q(block=0, stage=0)
585	            if const_expr(q_stage == 2):
586	                load_Q(block=1, stage=1)
587	
588	        # SM100 doesn't use producer_acquire for pipeline_kv in load path
589	        # The pipeline barriers are handled inside load_KV
590	        load_K(block=n_block_first, producer_state=kv_producer_state, page_idx=None)
591	        kv_producer_state.advance()
592	        load_V(block=n_block_first, producer_state=kv_producer_state, page_idx=None)
593	        kv_producer_state.advance()
594	
595	        # Remaining blocks
596	        for offset in cutlass.range(1, block_count):
597	            n_block = block_indices[block_end - 1 - offset]
598	            load_K(block=n_block, producer_state=kv_producer_state, page_idx=None)
599	            kv_producer_state.advance()
600	            load_V(block=n_block, producer_state=kv_producer_state, page_idx=None)
601	            kv_producer_state.advance()
602	
603	    return kv_producer_state
604	
605	
606	# SM100-specific tile processor using SM100 helpers
607	@cute.jit
608	def produce_block_sparse_loads_sm100(
609	    blocksparse_tensors: BlockSparseTensors,
610	    batch_idx,
611	    head_idx,
612	    m_block,
613	    seqlen_info: SeqlenInfoQK,
614	    split_idx: Int32,
615	    num_splits: Int32,
616	    kv_producer_state,
617	    load_Q,
618	    load_K,
619	    load_V,
620	    pipeline_kv,
621	    q_stage: cutlass.Constexpr,
622	    q_producer_phase: Int32,
623	    qhead_per_kvhead: cutlass.Constexpr,
624	    q_subtile_factor: cutlass.Constexpr,
625	):
626	    """SM100 entry point for sparse block iteration.
627	
628	    SM100 uses PipelineTmaUmma which doesn't support extra_tx_count, so we use
629	    simplified block processing that just calls producer_acquire without extras.
630	
631	    Args:
632	        m_block: which tile of m we are processing
633	        qhead_per_kvhead: Constexpr pack factor
634	    """
635	    m_block_sparse = sparse_tensor_m_block(m_block, qhead_per_kvhead, q_subtile_factor)
636	
637	    (
638	        curr_mask_block_cnt,
639	        curr_mask_block_idx,
640	        curr_full_block_cnt,
641	        curr_full_block_idx,
642	    ) = get_curr_blocksparse_tensors(
643	        batch_idx,
644	        head_idx,
645	        m_block_sparse,
646	        blocksparse_tensors,
647	        seqlen_info,
648	    )
649	
650	    mask_begin, mask_end = split_block_range(curr_mask_block_cnt, split_idx, num_splits)
651	    full_begin, full_end = split_block_range(curr_full_block_cnt, split_idx, num_splits)
652	    mask_empty = mask_begin == mask_end
653	    full_empty = full_begin == full_end
654	
655	    q_phase_flipped = False
656	
657	    if mask_empty:
658	        # No masked blocks: process full list with Q loading
659	        kv_producer_state = load_block_list_sm100(
660	            curr_full_block_idx,
661	            full_begin,
662	            full_end,
663	            load_q_with_first=True,
664	            q_stage=q_stage,
665	            kv_producer_state=kv_producer_state,
666	            load_Q=load_Q,
667	            load_K=load_K,
668	            load_V=load_V,
669	            pipeline_kv=pipeline_kv,
670	        )
671	        q_phase_flipped = not full_empty
672	    else:
673	        # Process masked blocks with Q loading
674	        kv_producer_state = load_block_list_sm100(
675	            curr_mask_block_idx,
676	            mask_begin,
677	            mask_end,
678	            load_q_with_first=True,
679	            q_stage=q_stage,
680	            kv_producer_state=kv_producer_state,
681	            load_Q=load_Q,
682	            load_K=load_K,
683	            load_V=load_V,
684	            pipeline_kv=pipeline_kv,
685	        )
686	        q_phase_flipped = True
687	
688	        if not full_empty:
689	            # Process full blocks without Q loading
690	            kv_producer_state = load_block_list_sm100(
691	                curr_full_block_idx,
692	                full_begin,
693	                full_end,
694	                load_q_with_first=False,
695	                q_stage=q_stage,
696	                kv_producer_state=kv_producer_state,
697	                load_Q=load_Q,
698	                load_K=load_K,
699	                load_V=load_V,
700	                pipeline_kv=pipeline_kv,
701	            )
702	
703	    if q_phase_flipped:
704	        q_producer_phase ^= 1
705	
706	    return kv_producer_state, q_producer_phase
707	
708	
709	@cute.jit
710	def get_total_block_count(
711	    blocksparse_tensors: BlockSparseTensors,
712	    batch_idx,
713	    head_idx,
714	    m_block,
715	    split_idx: Int32,
716	    num_splits: Int32,
717	    qhead_per_kvhead: cutlass.Constexpr,
718	    q_subtile_factor: cutlass.Constexpr,
719	    seqlen_info: SeqlenInfoQK,
720	):
721	    m_block_sparse = sparse_tensor_m_block(m_block, qhead_per_kvhead, q_subtile_factor)
722	    (
723	        curr_mask_block_cnt,
724	        _,
725	        curr_full_block_cnt,
726	        _,
727	    ) = get_curr_blocksparse_tensors(
728	        batch_idx,
729	        head_idx,
730	        m_block_sparse,
731	        blocksparse_tensors,
732	        seqlen_info,
733	    )
734	
735	    mask_begin, mask_end = split_block_range(curr_mask_block_cnt, split_idx, num_splits)
736	    full_begin, full_end = split_block_range(curr_full_block_cnt, split_idx, num_splits)
737	    return mask_end - mask_begin + full_end - full_begin
738

740	@cute.jit
741	def handle_block_sparse_empty_tile_correction_sm100(
742	    tidx: Int32,
743	    q_stage: cutlass.Constexpr,
744	    m_block_size: cutlass.Constexpr,
745	    qhead_per_kvhead,
746	    pack_gqa: cutlass.Constexpr,
747	    is_split_kv: cutlass.Constexpr,
748	    learnable_sink,
749	    mLSE,
750	    seqlen_info,
751	    m_block: Int32,
752	    head_idx: Int32,
753	    batch_idx: Int32,
754	    split_idx: Int32,
755	    sScale: cute.Tensor,
756	    stats: list,
757	    correction_epilogue: Callable,
758	    thr_mma_pv: cute.ThrMma,
759	    tOtO: cute.Tensor,
760	    sO: cute.Tensor,
761	    pipeline_sm_stats: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineAsync,
762	    sm_stats_barrier: cutlass.pipeline.NamedBarrier,
763	    pipeline_o_epi: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineAsync,
764	    sm_stats_consumer_phase: Int32,
765	    o_corr_consumer_phase: Int32,
766	    corr_epi_producer_phase: Int32,
767	    softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
768	    max_offset: Float32,
769	    max_offset_scale: Float32,
770	    mO_cur: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
771	    gO: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
772	    gmem_tiled_copy_O: Optional[cute.TiledCopy] = None,
773	):
774	    """Handle SM100 forward block-sparse tiles with no active KV blocks.
775	
776	    This path is taken when `total_block_cnt == 0`. The softmax warp-group still
777	    arrives `mbar_softmax_corr_full` (synthetic "no work") so the correction
778	    warp-group can:
779	
780	    - seed fully-masked-row stats (row_sum=1; row_max=-inf when tracked) for LSE
781	    - run `correction_epilogue` with `scale=0` so the output tile is written as zeros
782	      (independent of any prior tmem contents)
783	    - wait on `mbar_softmax_corr_full` and arrive `mbar_softmax_corr_empty`
784	      (and `mbar_corr_epi_*` when applicable) so phases stay aligned across tiles
785	
786	    This helper intentionally does not touch `mbar_P_full_*` since no P is produced.
787	    See NOTE [SM100 block-sparse empty tiles: mbarrier contract].
788	    """
789	    LOG2_E = Float32(math.log2(math.e))
790	    warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % 4
791	
792	    for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(q_stage):
793	        row_sum_value = Float32(1.0)
794	        row_max_value = (
795	            -Float32.inf if const_expr(mLSE is not None or learnable_sink is not None) else None
796	        )
797	        if const_expr(learnable_sink is not None):
798	            sink_val = -Float32.inf
799	            if const_expr(not pack_gqa):
800	                sink_val = Float32(learnable_sink[head_idx])
801	            elif tidx < m_block_size:
802	                q_head_idx = (
803	                    (q_stage * m_block + stage) * m_block_size + tidx
804	                ) % qhead_per_kvhead + head_idx * qhead_per_kvhead
805	                sink_val = Float32(learnable_sink[q_head_idx])
806	            if sink_val != -Float32.inf and (const_expr(not is_split_kv) or split_idx == 0):
807	                if row_max_value == -Float32.inf:
808	                    row_max_value = sink_val * (LOG2_E / softmax_scale_log2)
809	                    row_sum_value = max_offset_scale
810	                else:
811	                    row_sum_value = row_sum_value + cute.math.exp2(
812	                        sink_val * LOG2_E - row_max_value * softmax_scale_log2 + max_offset,
813	                        fastmath=True,
814	                    )
815	        if tidx < m_block_size:
816	            scale_row_idx = tidx + stage * m_block_size
817	            sScale[scale_row_idx] = row_sum_value
818	            if const_expr(mLSE is not None or learnable_sink is not None):
819	                sScale[scale_row_idx + q_stage * m_block_size] = row_max_value
820	        acc_flag = row_sum_value == Float32(0.0) or row_sum_value != row_sum_value
821	        stats[stage] = (row_sum_value, row_max_value, acc_flag)
822	
823	        # See NOTE [SM100 block-sparse empty tiles: mbarrier contract].
824	        # pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_wait_w_index_phase(stage, sm_stats_consumer_phase)
825	        sm_stats_barrier.arrive_and_wait_w_index(index=stage * 4 + warp_idx)
826	        pipeline_sm_stats.consumer_release_w_index(stage)
827	
828	        if const_expr(gmem_tiled_copy_O is None):
829	            pipeline_o_epi.producer_acquire_w_index_phase(stage, corr_epi_producer_phase)
830	
831	        gO_stage = gO[None, None, stage] if const_expr(gO is not None) else None
832	        correction_epilogue(
833	            thr_mma_pv,
834	            tOtO[None, None, None, stage],
835	            tidx,
836	            stage,
837	            m_block,
838	            seqlen_info.seqlen_q,
839	            Float32(0.0),  # zero scale ensures empty tile writes zeros into staged outputs
840	            sO[None, None, stage],
841	            mO_cur,
842	            gO_stage,
843	            gmem_tiled_copy_O,
844	        )
845	        if const_expr(gmem_tiled_copy_O is None):
846	            pipeline_o_epi.producer_commit_w_index(stage)
847	
848	    sm_stats_consumer_phase ^= 1
849	    corr_epi_producer_phase ^= 1
850	
851	    return (
852	        sm_stats_consumer_phase,
853	        o_corr_consumer_phase,
854	        corr_epi_producer_phase,
855	    )
856

858	@cute.jit
859	def softmax_block_sparse_sm100(
860	    blocksparse_tensors: BlockSparseTensors,
861	    batch_idx,
862	    head_idx,
863	    m_block,
864	    seqlen_info: SeqlenInfoQK,
865	    split_idx: Int32,
866	    num_splits: Int32,
867	    softmax_step: Callable,
868	    mask_fn: Callable,
869	    mask_fn_none: Callable,
870	    mma_si_consumer_phase: Int32,
871	    si_corr_producer_phase: Int32,
872	    s0_s1_sequence_phase: Int32,
873	    pipeline_sm_stats: cutlass.pipeline.PipelineAsync,
874	    sm_stats_barrier: cutlass.pipeline.NamedBarrier,
875	    q_stage: cutlass.Constexpr,
876	    stage_idx: Int32,
877	    check_m_boundary: bool,
878	    qhead_per_kvhead: cutlass.Constexpr,
879	    q_subtile_factor: cutlass.Constexpr[int] = 1,
880	):
881	    warp_idx = cute.arch.make_warp_uniform(cute.arch.warp_idx()) % 4
882	    m_block_sparse = sparse_tensor_m_block(m_block, qhead_per_kvhead, q_subtile_factor)
883	
884	    (
885	        curr_mask_block_cnt,
886	        curr_mask_block_idx,
887	        curr_full_block_cnt,
888	        curr_full_block_idx,
889	    ) = get_curr_blocksparse_tensors(
890	        batch_idx,
891	        head_idx,
892	        m_block_sparse,
893	        blocksparse_tensors,
894	        seqlen_info,
895	    )
896	
897	    mask_begin, mask_end = split_block_range(curr_mask_block_cnt, split_idx, num_splits)
898	    full_begin, full_end = split_block_range(curr_full_block_cnt, split_idx, num_splits)
899	    split_mask_block_cnt = mask_end - mask_begin
900	    split_full_block_cnt = full_end - full_begin
901	    total_block_cnt = split_mask_block_cnt + split_full_block_cnt
902	
903	    if total_block_cnt == 0:
904	        sm_stats_barrier.arrive_w_index(index=stage_idx * 4 + warp_idx)
905	    else:
906	        if split_mask_block_cnt > 0:
907	            mask_n_block = curr_mask_block_idx[mask_end - 1]
908	            (
909	                mma_si_consumer_phase,
910	                si_corr_producer_phase,
911	                s0_s1_sequence_phase,
912	            ) = softmax_step(
913	                mma_si_consumer_phase,
914	                si_corr_producer_phase,
915	                s0_s1_sequence_phase,
916	                mask_n_block,
917	                is_first=True,
918	                mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_seqlen=True, check_q_boundary=check_m_boundary),
919	            )
920	            for i in cutlass.range(1, split_mask_block_cnt):
921	                mask_n_block = curr_mask_block_idx[mask_end - 1 - i]
922	                (
923	                    mma_si_consumer_phase,
924	                    si_corr_producer_phase,
925	                    s0_s1_sequence_phase,
926	                ) = softmax_step(
927	                    mma_si_consumer_phase,
928	                    si_corr_producer_phase,
929	                    s0_s1_sequence_phase,
930	                    mask_n_block,
931	                    mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_seqlen=False, check_q_boundary=check_m_boundary),
932	                )
933	
934	        if split_full_block_cnt > 0:
935	            full_n_block = curr_full_block_idx[full_end - 1]
936	            if split_mask_block_cnt == 0:
937	                (
938	                    mma_si_consumer_phase,
939	                    si_corr_producer_phase,
940	                    s0_s1_sequence_phase,
941	                ) = softmax_step(
942	                    mma_si_consumer_phase,
943	                    si_corr_producer_phase,
944	                    s0_s1_sequence_phase,
945	                    full_n_block,
946	                    is_first=True,
947	                    mask_fn=partial(
948	                        mask_fn_none, mask_seqlen=True, check_q_boundary=check_m_boundary
949	                    ),
950	                )
951	            else:
952	                (
953	                    mma_si_consumer_phase,
954	                    si_corr_producer_phase,
955	                    s0_s1_sequence_phase,
956	                ) = softmax_step(
957	                    mma_si_consumer_phase,
958	                    si_corr_producer_phase,
959	                    s0_s1_sequence_phase,
960	                    full_n_block,
961	                    is_first=False,
962	                    mask_fn=partial(
963	                        mask_fn_none, mask_seqlen=True, check_q_boundary=check_m_boundary
964	                    ),
965	                )
966	            for i in cutlass.range(1, split_full_block_cnt):
967	                full_n_block = curr_full_block_idx[full_end - 1 - i]
968	                (
969	                    mma_si_consumer_phase,
970	                    si_corr_producer_phase,
971	                    s0_s1_sequence_phase,
972	                ) = softmax_step(
973	                    mma_si_consumer_phase,
974	                    si_corr_producer_phase,
975	                    s0_s1_sequence_phase,
976	                    full_n_block,
977	                    mask_fn=partial(
978	                        mask_fn_none, mask_seqlen=False, check_q_boundary=check_m_boundary
979	                    ),
980	                )
981	
982	    return (
983	        mma_si_consumer_phase,
984	        si_corr_producer_phase,
985	        s0_s1_sequence_phase,
986	        total_block_cnt == 0,
987	    )

990	# =============================================================================
991	# Backward-specific block-sparse helpers (SM100)
992	# =============================================================================
993	#
994	# In backward, iteration is transposed compared to forward:
995	# - Forward: outer loop over m_blocks (Q tiles), inner loop over n_blocks (KV tiles)
996	# - Backward: outer loop over n_blocks (KV tiles), inner loop over m_blocks (Q tiles)
997	#
998	# The backward block-sparse tensors use "Q direction" indexing:
999	# - q_block_cnt[batch, head, n_block] → count of m_blocks to process for this KV tile
1000	# - q_block_idx[batch, head, n_block, :] → indices of m_blocks to process
1001	#
1002	
1003	
1004	@cute.jit
1005	def get_total_q_block_count_bwd(
1006	    blocksparse_tensors: BlockSparseTensors,
1007	    batch_idx,
1008	    head_idx,
1009	    n_block,
1010	    q_subtile_factor: cutlass.Constexpr = 1,
1011	    m_block_max: int = 0,
1012	):
1013	    """Count total tile iterations for given n_block (KV tile) in backward."""
1014	    q_block_cnt, _, full_block_cnt, _, *_ = blocksparse_tensors
1015	    total = q_block_cnt[batch_idx, head_idx, n_block]
1016	    if const_expr(full_block_cnt is not None):
1017	        total = total + full_block_cnt[batch_idx, head_idx, n_block]
1018	    return total * q_subtile_factor
1019

1021	@cute.jit
1022	def produce_block_sparse_q_loads_bwd_sm100(
1023	    blocksparse_tensors: BlockSparseTensors,
1024	    batch_idx,
1025	    head_idx,
1026	    n_block,
1027	    # Pipeline states (will be returned after advancing)
1028	    producer_state_Q_LSE,
1029	    producer_state_dO_dPsum,
1030	    # Pipelines
1031	    pipeline_Q,
1032	    pipeline_LSE,
1033	    pipeline_dO,
1034	    pipeline_dPsum,
1035	    # Load functions
1036	    load_K,
1037	    load_V,
1038	    load_Q,
1039	    load_dO,
1040	    copy_stats,
1041	    # Global tensors for LSE/dPsum
1042	    gLSE,
1043	    sLSE,
1044	    gdPsum,
1045	    sdPsum,
1046	    # TMA copy bytes for extra_tx_count
1047	    tma_copy_bytes_K,
1048	    tma_copy_bytes_V,
1049	    # Flags for which loads to perform
1050	    should_load_Q: cutlass.Constexpr,
1051	    should_load_dO: cutlass.Constexpr,
1052	    # Subtiling factor and bounds
1053	    q_subtile_factor: cutlass.Constexpr = 1,
1054	    m_block_max: int = 0,
1055	):
1056	    """SM100 backward block sparse loading with subtiling.
1057	
1058	    Returns updated (producer_state_Q_LSE, producer_state_dO_dPsum).
1059	    First iteration loads K/V alongside Q/dO; subsequent iterations load only Q/dO.
1060	    """
1061	    (
1062	        curr_q_cnt,
1063	        curr_q_idx,
1064	        curr_full_cnt,
1065	        curr_full_idx,
1066	        loop_count,
1067	    ) = get_block_sparse_iteration_info_bwd(
1068	        blocksparse_tensors, batch_idx, head_idx, n_block, q_subtile_factor, m_block_max
1069	    )
1070	
1071	    for iter_idx in cutlass.range(loop_count, unroll=1):
1072	        m_block, _ = get_m_block_from_iter_bwd(
1073	            iter_idx,
1074	            curr_q_cnt,
1075	            curr_q_idx,
1076	            curr_full_cnt,
1077	            curr_full_idx,
1078	            q_subtile_factor,
1079	            m_block_max,
1080	        )
1081	        m_block_safe = m_block
1082	        if m_block_max > 0:
1083	            m_block_safe = cutlass.min(m_block, m_block_max - 1)
1084	
1085	        if iter_idx == 0:
1086	            # First block: load K/V alongside Q/dO
1087	            if const_expr(should_load_Q):
1088	                pipeline_Q.producer_acquire(producer_state_Q_LSE, extra_tx_count=tma_copy_bytes_K)
1089	                load_K(tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_Q.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_Q_LSE))
1090	                load_Q(m_block_safe, producer_state=producer_state_Q_LSE)
1091	                pipeline_Q.producer_commit(producer_state_Q_LSE)
1092	                pipeline_LSE.producer_acquire(producer_state_Q_LSE)
1093	                with cute.arch.elect_one():
1094	                    copy_stats(
1095	                        gLSE[None, m_block_safe],
1096	                        sLSE[None, producer_state_Q_LSE.index],
1097	                        mbar_ptr=pipeline_LSE.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_Q_LSE),
1098	                    )
1099	                producer_state_Q_LSE.advance()
1100	            if const_expr(should_load_dO):
1101	                pipeline_dO.producer_acquire(
1102	                    producer_state_dO_dPsum, extra_tx_count=tma_copy_bytes_V
1103	                )
1104	                load_V(tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_dO.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_dO_dPsum))
1105	                load_dO(m_block_safe, producer_state=producer_state_dO_dPsum)
1106	                pipeline_dO.producer_commit(producer_state_dO_dPsum)
1107	                pipeline_dPsum.producer_acquire(producer_state_dO_dPsum)
1108	                with cute.arch.elect_one():
1109	                    copy_stats(
1110	                        gdPsum[None, m_block_safe],
1111	                        sdPsum[None, producer_state_dO_dPsum.index],
1112	                        mbar_ptr=pipeline_dPsum.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_dO_dPsum),
1113	                    )
1114	                producer_state_dO_dPsum.advance()
1115	        else:
1116	            # Subsequent blocks: just load Q/dO (K/V already loaded)
1117	            if const_expr(should_load_Q):
1118	                pipeline_Q.producer_acquire(producer_state_Q_LSE)
1119	                load_Q(m_block_safe, producer_state=producer_state_Q_LSE)
1120	                pipeline_Q.producer_commit(producer_state_Q_LSE)
1121	                pipeline_LSE.producer_acquire(producer_state_Q_LSE)
1122	                with cute.arch.elect_one():
1123	                    copy_stats(
1124	                        gLSE[None, m_block_safe],
1125	                        sLSE[None, producer_state_Q_LSE.index],
1126	                        mbar_ptr=pipeline_LSE.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_Q_LSE),
1127	                    )
1128	                producer_state_Q_LSE.advance()
1129	            if const_expr(should_load_dO):
1130	                pipeline_dO.producer_acquire(producer_state_dO_dPsum)
1131	                load_dO(m_block_safe, producer_state=producer_state_dO_dPsum)
1132	                pipeline_dO.producer_commit(producer_state_dO_dPsum)
1133	                pipeline_dPsum.producer_acquire(producer_state_dO_dPsum)
1134	                with cute.arch.elect_one():
1135	                    copy_stats(
1136	                        gdPsum[None, m_block_safe],
1137	                        sdPsum[None, producer_state_dO_dPsum.index],
1138	                        mbar_ptr=pipeline_dPsum.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_dO_dPsum),
1139	                    )
1140	                producer_state_dO_dPsum.advance()
1141	
1142	    return producer_state_Q_LSE, producer_state_dO_dPsum
1143	
1144	
1145	@cute.jit
1146	def get_block_sparse_iteration_info_bwd(
1147	    blocksparse_tensors: BlockSparseTensors,
1148	    batch_idx,
1149	    head_idx,
1150	    n_block,
1151	    q_subtile_factor: cutlass.Constexpr = 1,
1152	    m_block_max: int = 0,
1153	):
1154	    """Extract block-sparse iteration info for backward pass.
1155	
1156	    Returns (curr_q_cnt, curr_q_idx, curr_full_cnt, curr_full_idx, total_count).
1157	    """
1158	    q_cnt, q_idx, full_cnt, full_idx, *_ = blocksparse_tensors
1159	    curr_q_cnt = q_cnt[batch_idx, head_idx, n_block]
1160	    curr_q_idx = q_idx[batch_idx, head_idx, n_block, None]
1161	
1162	    if const_expr(full_cnt is not None):
1163	        curr_full_cnt = full_cnt[batch_idx, head_idx, n_block]
1164	        curr_full_idx = full_idx[batch_idx, head_idx, n_block, None]
1165	    else:
1166	        curr_full_cnt = Int32(0)
1167	        curr_full_idx = None
1168	
1169	    sparse_block_count = curr_q_cnt
1170	    if const_expr(full_cnt is not None):
1171	        sparse_block_count = sparse_block_count + curr_full_cnt
1172	    total_count = sparse_block_count * q_subtile_factor
1173	
1174	    return curr_q_cnt, curr_q_idx, curr_full_cnt, curr_full_idx, total_count
1175

1177	@cute.jit
1178	def get_m_block_from_iter_bwd(
1179	    iter_idx,
1180	    curr_q_cnt,
1181	    curr_q_idx: cute.Tensor,
1182	    curr_full_cnt,
1183	    curr_full_idx: Optional[cute.Tensor],
1184	    q_subtile_factor: cutlass.Constexpr = 1,
1185	    m_block_max: int = 0,
1186	):
1187	    """Derive m_block index and is_full_block flag from iteration index.
1188	
1189	    Returns (m_block, is_full_block):
1190	        - m_block: The actual Q-tile block index
1191	        - is_full_block: True if this is a full block (no mask_mod needed)
1192	    """
1193	    sparse_iter_idx = iter_idx // q_subtile_factor
1194	    subtile_offset = iter_idx % q_subtile_factor
1195	
1196	    sparse_m_block = Int32(0)
1197	    is_full_block = False
1198	    if const_expr(curr_full_idx is not None):
1199	        if sparse_iter_idx < curr_q_cnt:
1200	            sparse_m_block = curr_q_idx[sparse_iter_idx]
1201	        else:
1202	            sparse_m_block = curr_full_idx[sparse_iter_idx - curr_q_cnt]
1203	            is_full_block = True
1204	    else:
1205	        sparse_m_block = curr_q_idx[sparse_iter_idx]
1206	
1207	    return sparse_m_block * q_subtile_factor + subtile_offset, is_full_block
1208	
1209	
1210	@cute.jit
1211	def _load_q_do_block_sm90(
1212	    m_block,
1213	    producer_state_Q,
1214	    producer_state_dO,
1215	    pipeline_Q,
1216	    pipeline_dO,
1217	    load_K,
1218	    load_V,
1219	    load_Q,
1220	    load_dO,
1221	    load_LSE,
1222	    load_dPsum,
1223	    tma_copy_bytes_K,
1224	    tma_copy_bytes_V,
1225	    Q_stage_eq_dO_stage: cutlass.Constexpr,
1226	    load_kv: bool,
1227	):
1228	    """Load one Q/dO block, optionally loading K/V on first iteration."""
1229	    if load_kv:
1230	        pipeline_Q.producer_acquire(producer_state_Q, extra_tx_count=tma_copy_bytes_K)
1231	        load_K(tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_Q.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_Q))
1232	    else:
1233	        pipeline_Q.producer_acquire(producer_state_Q)
1234	    load_Q(m_block, producer_state=producer_state_Q)
1235	    load_LSE(m_block, producer_state=producer_state_Q)
1236	
1237	    producer_state_dO_cur = (
1238	        producer_state_dO if const_expr(not Q_stage_eq_dO_stage) else producer_state_Q
1239	    )
1240	    if load_kv:
1241	        pipeline_dO.producer_acquire(producer_state_dO_cur, extra_tx_count=tma_copy_bytes_V)
1242	        load_V(tma_bar_ptr=pipeline_dO.producer_get_barrier(producer_state_dO_cur))
1243	    else:
1244	        pipeline_dO.producer_acquire(producer_state_dO_cur)
1245	    load_dO(m_block, producer_state=producer_state_dO_cur)
1246	    load_dPsum(m_block, producer_state=producer_state_dO_cur)
1247	
1248	    producer_state_Q.advance()
1249	    producer_state_dO.advance()
1250	    return producer_state_Q, producer_state_dO

1274	):
1275	    """SM90 backward block sparse loading with separate partial/full loops.
1276	
1277	    K/V are loaded with the first valid block. Iterates partial blocks first,
1278	    then full blocks, matching consumer order.

1280	    Returns updated (producer_state_Q, producer_state_dO).

1291	        curr_full_idx = None
1292	
1293	    kv_loaded = False

1295	    for iter_idx in cutlass.range(curr_q_cnt * q_subtile_factor, unroll=1):
1296	        sparse_idx = iter_idx // q_subtile_factor
1297	        subtile_offset = iter_idx % q_subtile_factor
1298	        m_block = curr_q_idx[sparse_idx] * q_subtile_factor + subtile_offset
1299	
1300	        if m_block < m_block_max:
1301	            producer_state_Q, producer_state_dO = _load_q_do_block_sm90(
1302	                m_block,

1317	            )
1318	            kv_loaded = True

1321	        for iter_idx in cutlass.range(curr_full_cnt * q_subtile_factor, unroll=1):

1323	            subtile_offset = iter_idx % q_subtile_factor
1324	            m_block = curr_full_idx[sparse_idx] * q_subtile_factor + subtile_offset
1325	
1326	            if m_block < m_block_max:

1328	                    m_block,
